stemHtml: Using the convergency formula, the change of longitude is equal to (1) _____. Convergency is expressed in (2) _____.

options.b: (1) convergency x sin (mean latitude); (2) minutes in latitude
options.c: (1) convergency / sin (mean latitude); (2) degrees and minutes
options.d: (1) convergency x sin (mean latitude); (2) minutes in longitude
